title: Contact information feeding into task board (auto-populate)

posts.author: mviquez (Michael Viquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to get information from a board with contact information to auto-populate in columns on another board? I know that I can connect the boards, but I am unable to figure out how to populate the information.

Here is what I am trying to do. I want to have 3 boards:

  1. Contact Board: Where I would have contact names, company names, phone #s, emails, etc.
  2. Task Board: This would be were we would track the progress of the tasks.
  3. Invoice Board: This would have the information of the 2 other boards to invoice.

I have the Task Board already feeding all of the information into the Invoice Board by connecting the items through the automation. I just need to connect the Contact Board. I know that I can create a mirror column for the information, but do I have to connect the information to both boards? And, how do I get all of the information. Do I need to create a mirror column for each column in the Contact Board.

Any help would be greatly appreciated.
